item.title: Spot Offer Deal Breakers Early 🚩 • Check for vague roles—clarity is key. • Look for unrealistic expectations. • Beware of low growth opportunities. • Ensure alignment with your values. • Review benefits—don't overlook them! What red flags have you noticed in job offers that were deal breakers? #career #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
item.description: Spot Offer Deal Breakers Early 🚩 • Check for vague roles—clarity is key. • Look for unrealistic expectations. • Beware of low growth opportunities. • Ensure alignment with your values. • Review benefits—don't overlook them! What red flags have you noticed in job offers that were deal breakers? #career #jobsearch #ScalePilot #SocialPilot #AIAutomations
